summary: Iteration 88 - Comprehensive testing of Cash Book, Balance Sheet, and ErrorBoundary features. All 12 backend tests passed and all frontend UI tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Cash Book shows party types, Party Ledger tab works without crash, Balance Sheet has correct agent_accounts calculated from entries and ledger, Cash Book DELETE works for basic transactions, ErrorBoundary wraps all tabs and protects against crashes.

verified: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with valid credentials
Returns 401 for invalid password
Frontend login redirects to main app

cash_book_party_types.description: Cash Book page loads with transactions showing party types
verified: GET /api/cash-book returns transactions with party_type field
Frontend shows Party Type column in transactions table
Types include: Staff, Local Party, Pvt Paddy Purchase, Truck, Diesel, Agent, etc.
112 transactions total in the system

party_ledger_tab.description: Party Ledger tab under Cash Book works without crashing
verified: Party Ledgers tab clickable via data-testid='cashbook-tab-transactions'
Shows ledger account transactions filtered by account='ledger'
No ErrorBoundary triggered
Proper filtering by Account, Type, Party Type available

balance_sheet_agent_accounts.description: Balance Sheet API returns correct agent_accounts based on entries and ledger nikasi
verified: GET /api/fy-summary/balance-sheet?kms_year=2025-2026 returns agent_accounts
Each agent has: name, total (from mill_entries.agent_amount), paid (from ledger nikasi), balance
Balance = total - paid calculation correct
Agent/Mandi Accounts section visible on Balance Sheet UI with Balance: -4,000.00

cash_book_delete_reversal.description: DELETE /api/cash-book/{id} works correctly and handles linked payments
verified: DELETE basic transaction returns 200
Transaction removed from database after delete
DELETE non-existent ID returns 404
Code review: truck payment reversal handled via linked_payment_id.startswith('truck:')
Code review: agent payment reversal handled via linked_payment_id.startswith('agent:')

error_boundary_present.description: ErrorBoundary wraps all tab content and prevents blank page crashes
verified: ErrorBoundary.jsx component exists with data-testid='error-boundary'
App.js imports and uses ErrorBoundary
All 11 tabs tested without triggering ErrorBoundary (no crashes)
ErrorBoundary only shows when there's an actual error
Retry button (data-testid='error-retry-btn') available in error state

cash_book_post_party_type_auto_detect.description: POST /api/cash-book with agent category auto-detects party_type
verified: Code review: cashbook.py lines 74-126 implement auto-detection logic
Checks mandi_targets collection for Agent detection
Also checks: private_paddy, rice_sales, diesel_accounts, local_party_accounts, truck_payments, staff
Retroactively updates old entries with same category to new party_type

code_review_notes.cashbook_delete_handler: Lines 331-417 in cashbook.py properly handle: 1) Pvt Paddy paid_amount revert, 2) Truck payment revert via linked_payment_id='truck:*', 3) Agent payment revert via linked_payment_id='agent:*', 4) Auto-ledger entry cleanup
code_review_notes.balance_sheet_agent_accounts: Lines 426-442 in fy_summary.py correctly calculate: total from mill_entries.agent_amount, paid from ledger nikasi transactions, balance = total - paid
code_review_notes.error_boundary: ErrorBoundary.jsx is a class component with getDerivedStateFromError and componentDidCatch, renders error UI with retry button
